## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature. Include SQL syntax, API shape, or config examples if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Use Case

Real-world scenario where this feature is needed.
- Domain: [Finance / IoT / Observability / Other]
- Scale: [rows/sec, data volume, query pattern]
